path: data_visualization_panel/simple_app.py
---
import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from flask import Flask, render_template_string
import numpy as np

app = Flask(__name__)

# 生成三组实验数据
np.random.seed(42)
experiment_data = {
    'Control Group': np.random.normal(100, 15, 50),
    'Treatment A': np.random.normal(110, 12, 50),
    'Treatment B': np.random.normal(95, 18, 50)
}

@app.route('/')
def dashboard():
    # 创建箱线图
    fig = go.Figure()
    colors = ['#1f77b4', '#ff7f0e', '#2ca02c']
    
    for i, (group, data) in enumerate(experiment_data.items()):
        fig.add_trace(go.Box(y=data, name=group, marker_color=colors[i]))
    
    fig.update_layout(title='实验数据箱线图对比', xaxis_title='实验组别', yaxis_title='测量值')
    
    # 创建统计表
    stats = []
    for group, data in experiment_data.items():
        stats.append({
            '组别': group,
            '平均值': round(np.mean(data), 2),
            '中位数': round(np.median(data), 2),
            '标准差': round(np.std(data), 2)
        })
    
    stats_df = pd.DataFrame(stats)

    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html>
